title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 81.260 - Election of aldermen (cities of 20,000 and less than 250,000)
text:
81.260.  Election of aldermen (cities of 20,000 and less than 250,000). — Whenever any change in the number of wards or alteration in the boundaries of any ward shall be made, or new wards shall be established, there shall be no election of aldermen for such wards until the general election for corporation officers.
(RSMo 1939 § 7520) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7367; 1919 § 8781; 1909 § 9637
